scores.correctness_notes: Covers all required fields correctly: name, type, summary, description, containers, resources (oci-image), assumes with k8s-api. Includes the full set of optional top-level keys. Uses older `bases` build-on/run-on format rather than the newer `base`+`platforms` format shown in the gold standard, but the content is factually correct.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — all fields, parameters, and structures shown (containers, resources, oci-image, assumes, charm-libs, parts/plugin: uv, action additionalProperties, optional on requires) are real and valid charmcraft concepts
